additional_notification_targets.description: List of email addresses to receive entitlement-related notifications; must be valid email addresses.

approval_workflow.description: Defines the approval workflow configuration for managing privileged access, specifying the steps and rules required for entitlement requests.
approval_workflow.type: list(object({manual_approvals: list(object({require_approver_justification: optional(bool),steps: list(object({approvals_needed: optional(number),approver_email_recipients: optional(list(string)),approvers: list(object({principals: list(string)}))}))}))}))

eligible_users.description: List of users eligible to access the entitlement; must be provided as email addresses.

entitlement_id.description: Unique identifier for the entitlement resource, required to manage privileged access.

location.description: Specifies the Google Cloud region where the Privileged Access Manager entitlement will be created.

max_request_duration.description: Specifies the maximum duration, in seconds, for which access requests can remain active. Must be a positive integer.

parent.description: Specifies the resource name of the parent folder or organization for the entitlement, formatted as `folders/{folder_id}` or `organizations/{organization_id}`.

privileged_access.description: Determines whether privileged access is enabled for the specified entitlement; must be set to true or false.
privileged_access.type: list(object({gcp_iam_access: list(object({resource: string,resource_type: string,role_bindings: list(object({condition_expression: optional(string),role: string}))}))}))

requester_justification_config.description: Configuration for specifying justification requirements for privileged access requests.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations. Specify in a format like "30m" for 30 minutes.
